Explore SDTM Datasets

Source: vignettes/articles/preview-sdtm.Rmd
preview-sdtm.Rmd

Datasets Preview

Here is a preview of all datasets included in the pharmaversesdtm package. Organized by therapeutic area, each dataset is displayed in a collapsible panel with filtering options for easier exploration. For simplicity, only the first 50 rows of each dataset are shown.

Generic

ae: Adverse EventsReference link
cm: Concomitant MedicationReference link
dm: DemographyReference link
ds: DispositionReference link
eg: ElectrocardiogramReference link
ex: ExposureReference link
is_ada: Immunogenicity Specimen Assessments for ADAReference link
lb: Laboratory MeasurementsReference link
mh: Medical HistoryReference link
pc: Pharmacokinetic ConcentrationsReference link
pp: Pharmacokinetic ParametersReference link
sdg_db: SDGReference link
smq_db: Standardized MedDRA QueriesReference link
suppae: Supplemental Adverse EventsReference link
suppdm: Supplemental DemographyReference link
suppds: Supplemental DispositionReference link
sv: Subject VisitsReference link
ts: Trial DesignReference link
vs: Vital SignsReference link

Metabolic

dm_metabolic: Demographic Dataset-metabolicReference link
lb_metabolic: Laboratory Measurements Dataset-metabolicReference link
qs_metabolic: Questionnaire Dataset-metabolicReference link
vs_metabolic: Vital signs Dataset-metabolicReference link

Microbiology

be: Biospecimen EventsReference link
mb: Microbiology SpecimenReference link
ms: Microbiology SusceptibilityReference link

Neurology

ag_neuro: Procedure Agents Dataset-neuroReference link
dm_neuro: Demographic Dataset-neuroReference link
lb_neuro: Laboratory Test Dataset-neuroReference link
nv_neuro: Neurological Assessment Dataset-neuroReference link
suppnv_neuro: Supplemental for Neurological Assessment Dataset-neuroReference link

Oncology

lb_onco_pcwg3: Laboratory Measurements (PSA) for OncologyReference link
rs_onco: Disease Response for OncologyReference link
rs_onco_ca125: Disease Response (GCIG)Reference link
rs_onco_imwg: Disease Response (IMWG)Reference link
rs_onco_irecist: Disease Response (iRECIST) for OncologyReference link
rs_onco_pcwg3: Disease Response (PCWG3) for OncologyReference link
rs_onco_recist: Disease Response (RECIST 1.1) for OncologyReference link
supprs_onco_ca125: Supplemental Qualifiers for RS_ONCO_CA125Reference link
supprs_onco_imwg: Supplemental Qualifiers for RS_ONCO_IMWGReference link
supptr_onco: Supplemental Tumor Results for OncologyReference link
tr_onco: Tumor Results for OncologyReference link
tr_onco_recist: Tumor Results (RECIST 1.1) for OncologyReference link
tu_onco: Tumor Identification for OncologyReference link
tu_onco_recist: Tumor Identification (RECIST 1.1) for OncologyReference link

Ophthalmology

ae_ophtha: Adverse Events for OphthalmologyReference link
ex_ophtha: Exposure for OphthalmologyReference link
oe_ophtha: Ophthalmic Examinations for OphthalmologyReference link
qs_ophtha: Questionnaire for OphthalmologyReference link
sc_ophtha: Subject Characteristic for OphthalmologyReference link

Pediatrics

dm_peds: Demographic Dataset-pediatricsReference link
vs_peds: Vital signs Dataset-pediatricsReference link

Vaccine

ce_vaccine: Clinical Events for VaccineReference link
dm_vaccine: Demographics for VaccineReference link
ex_vaccine: Exposures for VaccineReference link
face_vaccine: Findings About Clinical Events for VaccineReference link
is_vaccine: Immunogenicity Specimen Assessments for VaccineReference link
suppce_vaccine: Supplemental Qualifiers for Clinical Events for VaccineReference link
suppdm_vaccine: Supplemental Qualifiers for Demographics for VaccineReference link
suppex_vaccine: Supplemental Qualifiers for Exposures for VaccineReference link
suppface_vaccine: Supplemental Qualifiers for Findings About for Clinical Events for VaccineReference link
suppis_vaccine: Supplemental Qualifiers for Immunogenicity Specimen Assessments for VaccineReference link
vs_vaccine: Vital Signs for VaccineReference link

On this page

Developed by Cytel Inc., F. Hoffmann-La Roche AG, GlaxoSmithKline LLC, Lina Patil, Stefan Bundfuss, Kristin Dahnert, Fanny Gautier, Edoardo Mancini, Tomoyuki Namai, Vinh Nguyen, Gerardo Jose Rodriguez, Vladyslav Shuliar.
